SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut

Class SupernautContext

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.Context
com.nib.supernaut.SupernautContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExecutionContext, SecurityContext, AutoCloseable
public class SupernautContext extends Context implements AutoCloseable, ExecutionContext
SupernautContext provides the contextual environment for executing online programs with services such as region management, terminal handling, task management, and subsystems. It extends functionality from Context and supports auto-closable resources. This class serves as the integration point for interacting with various subsystems including file services, TS/TD queues, terminal services, and region transactions.

      Returns:
      Throws:

    • close

      public void close() throws Exception
      Closes the current context and releases all allocated resources. This method ensures that resources such as memory segments, spools, and connections are properly released or closed to prevent resource leaks.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Overrides:
      close in class Context
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during the closing process

    • trace

      public void trace(String format, Object... args)
      Logs a trace message at the INFO level. The message includes the current program stack size, program name, and the formatted message.
      Overrides:
      trace in class Context
      Parameters:
      format - the format string for the message
      args - the arguments to be formatted into the message

      Overrides:
      traceWarning in class Context
      Parameters:
      format - the format string for the message
      args - the arguments to be formatted into the message

    • beginExec

      protected void beginExec(CicsCommands cmd, com.nib.supernaut.SupernautContext.ExecParm... parms)
      Initiates the execution of a CICS command with additional parameters for execution.
      Parameters:
      cmd - The CICS command to be executed.
      parms - Optional parameters to trace the execution of the command.

    • endExec

      protected CommandResponse endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Finalizes the execution of a command and returns the resulting response.
      Parameters:
      commandResp - the current command response to be finalized
      cmd - the CICS command being executed
      nohandle - indicates whether error handling should be bypassed (true to bypass, false otherwise)
      resp - the primary response code variable capturing the result of the command execution
      resp2 - the secondary response code variable capturing additional result information
      Returns:
      the finalized CommandResponse object after execution
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs during execution
      ExitProgramException - if the program execution must be terminated

    • endExec

      protected CommandResponse endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, boolean handleAid, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Handles the end of CICS command execution by processing the command response, updating EIB fields, handling conditions and errors, and determining the appropriate action based on procedural logic or exception handling.
      Parameters:
      commandResp - the response received after executing a CICS command
      cmd - the CICS command that was executed
      nohandle - a flag indicating whether to bypass condition handling
      handleAid - a
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException
      ExitProgramException

    • link

      public LinkCommand link(String program)
      Creates and returns a LinkCommand object configured with the specified program.
      Parameters:
      program - the name or path of the program to be linked
      Returns:
      a LinkCommand object initialized with the program setting

    • link

      public LinkCommand link(NChar program)
      Creates and initializes a new LinkCommand with the specified program.
      Parameters:
      program - the program to be linked to this command
      Returns:
      an instance of LinkCommand initialized with the specified program

    • link

      public CommandResponse link(String program, AbstractNField commarea, int length, String sysid, String transid, Channel channel, boolean synconreturn, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Invoke (LINK) a program with the specified parameters. This method handles program invocation, transaction management, and error handling.
      Parameters:
      program - the name of the program to link to
      commarea - the communication area passed to the program
      length - the length of the communication area
      channel - the channel used for communication
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the LINK command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

    • load

      public AbstractProgram load(String name) throws ProgramNotFoundException
      Loads a program by its name. If the program is already loaded, it returns the cached instance. If the program is not found in the cache, it attempts to load it from the COBOL context or creates a new instance.
      Overrides:
      load in class Context
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the program to load
      Returns:
      the loaded `AbstractProgram` instance
      Throws:
      ProgramNotFoundException - if the program cannot be found

      Returns:
      a new `LoadCommand` instance configured with the program name

      a new `LoadCommand` instance configured with the program name

    • load

      public CommandResponse load(String program, NPointer set, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, XctlException, ExitProgramException
      Loads a program and set its storage. This method handles program loading, storage allocation, and error handling.
      Parameters:
      program - the name of the program to load
      set - the pointer to set the program's storage
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the LOAD command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      XctlException - if an XCTL exception occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

      public CommandResponse release(String program, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, XctlException, ExitProgramException
      Releases a previously loaded program from memory. If the program is not currently loaded, an appropriate response will be returned indicating the invocation was invalid.
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException
      XctlException
      ExitProgramException

    • xctl

      public CommandResponse xctl(String program, AbstractNField commarea, int length, Channel channel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, XctlException, ExitProgramException
      Transfer control (XCTL) to another program. This method handles program invocation, communication area duplication, and error handling.
      Parameters:
      program - the name of the program to transfer control to
      commarea - the communication area passed to the program
      length - the length of the communication area
      channel - the channel used for communication
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the XCTL command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      XctlException - if an XCTL exception occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

      Parameters:
      timeInterval - the interval duration for the delay
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the delay operation
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

    • bifDeedit

      public CommandResponse bifDeedit(AbstractNField field, int length, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
      Executes a BIF DEEDIT command to process a field by removing non-numeric characters and applying zoned sign encoding if necessary.
      Parameters:
      field - the field to be processed
      length - the length of the field
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the BIF DEEDIT command

    • handleAbend

      public HandleAbendCommand handleAbend()
      Creates a HANDLE ABEND command instance. This command is used to handle abnormal program termination (abend).
      Returns:
      a new `HandleAbendCommand` instance

    • handleAbend

      public CommandResponse handleAbend(String program, Integer labelId, boolean cancel) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Handles an abend condition by specifying the program and label ID. If the program is null, it clears the handle abend program. If the label ID is null, it clears the handle abend label ID.
      Parameters:
      program - the name of the program to handle the abend
      labelId - the label ID for handling the abend
      cancel - whether to cancel the abend handling
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the HANDLE ABEND command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

      public HandleConditionCommand handleCondition()
      Creates a HANDLE CONDITION command instance. This command is used to handle specific conditions in the program.

      a new `HandleConditionCommand` instance

      public CommandResponse pushHandleStack() throws OnlineErrorException
      Pushes a handle onto the stack for error handling. This method initializes the current stack entry and pushes a handle onto it.
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the PUSH HANDLE command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • popHandle

      public PopHandleCommand popHandle()
      Creates a POP HANDLE command instance. This command is used to pop a handle from the stack for error handling.
      Returns:
      a new `PopHandleCommand` instance

    • popHandleStack

      public CommandResponse popHandleStack() throws OnlineErrorException
      Pops a handle from the stack for error handling. This method checks if the current stack entry has a handle to pop and performs the operation.
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the POP HANDLE command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • returnToCaller

      public void returnToCaller() throws ExitProgramException, OnlineErrorException
      Returns control to the caller program. This method ends the current program execution and returns control to the caller.
      Throws:
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • goback

      public void goback() throws ReturnException
      Goback to the previous program in the stack. This method is used to return control to the previous program in the call stack.
      Overrides:
      goback in class Context
      Throws:
      ReturnException - always thrown to indicate a return operation

      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:

      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

      a new `AddressCommand` instance

    • addressCwa

      public CommandResponse addressCwa(NPointer ptr, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the pointer to its address. This method retrieves the CWA address and sets it to the provided pointer.
      Parameters:
      ptr - the pointer to set to the CWA address
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the ADDRESS CWA command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • addressCwa

      public CommandResponse addressCwa(AbstractNField field, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field. This method retrieves the CWA address and sets it to the provided field.
      Parameters:
      field - the field to set to the CWA address
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the ADDRESS CWA command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • getCwaAddress

      public NAddress getCwaAddress()
      Retrieves the CWA (Common Work Area) address. This method checks if the CWA address is already retrieved; if not, it retrieves it from the region services.
      Returns:
      a new `NAddress` instance representing the CWA address

    • addressCommarea

      public CommandResponse addressCommarea(AbstractNField ca, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Addresses the COMMAREA and sets the address of the provided field. This method retrieves the COMMAREA address and sets it to the provided field.
      Parameters:
      ca - the field to set to the COMMAREA address
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the ADDRESS COMMAREA command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

    • addressTwa

      public CommandResponse addressTwa(AbstractNField twaField, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Addresses the TWA (Task Work Area) and sets the address of the provided field. This method retrieves the TWA address and sets it to the provided field.
      Parameters:
      twaField - the field to set to the TWA address
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the ADDRESS TWA command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

    • getCommareaAddress

      public NAddress getCommareaAddress()
      Retrieves the address of the current communication area (COMMAREA). This method checks if the current stack entry has a communication area and returns its address.
      Returns:
      a new `NAddress` instance representing the COMMAREA address, or null if not available

    • getmain

      public GetMainCommand getmain()
      Creates a GETMAIN command instance. This command is used to allocate main storage in the CICS region.
      Returns:
      a new `GetMainCommand` instance

    • getmain

      public CommandResponse getmain(NPointer ptr, int length, byte initimg, boolean shared, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Allocates main storage with the specified parameters. This method handles memory allocation, initialization, and error handling.
      Parameters:
      ptr - the pointer to set to the allocated storage
      length - the length of the storage to allocate
      initimg - the initialization image byte
      shared - whether the storage is shared
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the GETMAIN command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • attachmain

      public AttachMainCommand attachmain()
      Creates an ATTACH MAIN command instance. This command is used to attach a pointer to previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage.
      Returns:
      a new `AttachMainCommand` instance

    • attachMain

      public CommandResponse attachMain(NPointer ptr, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Attaches a pointer to previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage. This method checks if the storage is available and sets the pointer accordingly.
      Parameters:
      ptr - the pointer to attach to the shared storage
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the ATTACH MAIN command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

    • freemain

      public FreeMainCommand freemain()
      Creates a FREEMAIN command instance. This command is used to release previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage.
      Returns:
      a new `FreeMainCommand` instance

    • freemain

      public CommandResponse freemain(AbstractNField ptr, boolean pointer, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Releases previously allocated GETMAIN shared storage. This method checks if the storage is available and releases it accordingly.
      Parameters:
      ptr - the pointer to the storage to release
      pointer - whether the pointer is a NPointer
      nohandle - whether to suppress error handling
      respVar - the variable to store the response code
      resp2Var - the variable to store the secondary response code
      Returns:
      a `CommandResponse` containing the result of the FREEMAIN command
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an online error occurs

      public CommandResponse abend(String abcode, boolean cancel, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException

      Parameters:
      abcode - the abend code
      cancel - if true, the handle abend program is cancelled
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response

      ExitProgramException

      public StartCommand startTransid(String transid)
      Creates a START TRANSID command
      Parameters:

      Creates a START TRANSID command

    • startTransid

      public CommandResponse startTransid(String sysid, String transid, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int fromLen, String termid, Interval timeInterval, Channel channel, String queue, boolean protect, boolean nocheck, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Starts a task with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      sysid - the system identifier (accepted but not used)
      transid - the transaction identifier
      from - the data to start with
      fromOffset - the offset in the data
      fromLen - the length of the data
      termid - the terminal identifier
      timeInterval - the time interval for starting the transaction
      channel - the channel to use for the transaction
      queue - the queue name
      protect - if true, protects the transaction
      nocheck - if true, does not check for errors
      nohandle - if true, does not handle errors
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution
      ExitProgramException - if the program exits unexpectedly

      public RetrieveCommand retrieve()
      Creates a RETRIEVE command.
      Returns:
      the RetrieveCommand instance

      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response

    • sendText

      public CommandResponse sendText(byte[] from, int fromOffset, int length, SendCommandFlags flags, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Sends text to the terminal from the specified byte array.
      Parameters:
      from - the byte array containing text to send
      fromOffset - the offset in the byte array
      length - the length of text to send
      flags - the flags for the send command
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

      public ReadCommand read(String file)
      Creates a READ FILE command.
      Parameters:
      file - the file name

    • readFile

      public CommandResponse readFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int intoLength, Rrn rrn, boolean equal, boolean generic, boolean update, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Reads data from a file into the specified byte array using a record reference number (RRN).
      Parameters:
      sysid - the system identifier (accepted but not used)
      file - the file name
      into - the byte array to store the read data
      intoOffset - the offset in the byte array
      intoLength - the length of data to read
      rrn - the record reference number (RRN) for the read operation
      equal - if true, reads the record with equal RRN; if false, reads for greater than or equal (GTEQ)
      generic - if true, allows generic reads
      update - if true, the read operation is for update
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

    • readFile

      public CommandResponse readFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int intoLength, Rba rba, boolean equal, boolean generic, boolean update, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Reads data from a file into the specified byte array using a record block address (RBA).
      Parameters:
      sysid - the system identifier (accepted but not used)
      file - the file name
      into - the byte array to store the read data
      intoOffset - the offset in the byte array
      intoLength - the length of data to read
      rba - the record block address (RBA) for the read operation
      equal - if true, reads the record with equal RBA; if false, reads for greater than or equal (GTEQ)
      generic - if true, allows generic reads
      update - if true, the read operation is for update
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value

      the command response

      Parameters:
      sysid - the system identifier (accepted but not used)
      file - the file name
      rrn - the record reference number (RRN) for the browse operation
      equal - if true, starts browsing from the record with equal RRN; if false, starts from greater than or equal (GTEQ)
      generic - if true, allows generic browsing
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value

      the command response

      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

    • resetbrFile

      public CommandResponse resetbrFile(String sysid, String file, Rba rba, boolean equal, boolean generic, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Resets the browse operation on a file using the record block address (RBA).
      Parameters:
      sysid - the system identifier (accepted but not used)
      file - the file name
      rba - the record block address (RBA) for the reset operation
      equal - if true, resets browsing to the record with equal RBA; if false, resets to greater than or equal (GTEQ)
      generic - if true, allows generic browsing
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

      public CommandResponse readNextFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int intoLength, byte[] ridfld, int ridfldOff, int keylength, boolean update, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException
      Reads the next record in a file using the record identifier field (RIDFLD).
      Parameters:
      sysid - the system identifier (accepted but not used)
      file - the file name
      into - the byte array to store the read data
      intoOffset - the offset in the byte array
      intoLength - the length of data to read
      ridfld - the record identifier field (RIDFLD) for the read operation
      ridfldOff - the offset in the RIDFLD byte array
      keylength - the length of the key in bytes
      update - if true, the read operation is for update
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

      public CommandResponse spoolOpenOutput(String userid, String node, String cls, String outdescr, SpoolCarriageReturn cr, boolean punch, int reclen, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Open a spool for output.
      Parameters:
      userid - the user ID for the spool operation
      node - the node associated with the spool operation
      cls - the class associated with the spool operation
      outdescr - the output description for the spool operation
      cr - the carriage return type for the spool operation
      punch - if true, the operation is a punch operation; otherwise, it is a print operation
      reclen - the record length for the spool operation
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response

      public CommandResponse documentCreate(AbstractDocumentCommand.InsertMode mode, String content, int length, String symbolList, Integer listLength, String delimiter, boolean unescaped, String hostcodepage, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Creates a document with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      mode - the insert mode for the document (e.g., Template, FromDoc, From, Text, Binary)
      content - the content to insert into the document
      length - the length of the content to insert
      symbolList - the list of symbols to decode
      listLength - the maximum length of the symbol list
      delimiter - the delimiter used in the symbol list
      unescaped - if true, the symbols are unescaped
      hostcodepage - the host code page for the document
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response

      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution

      the DocumentSetCommand instance

    • documentSet

      public CommandResponse documentSet(String doctoken, boolean symbol, String p1, String p2, boolean unescaped, int listLength, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var) throws OnlineErrorException, ExitProgramException
      Sets symbols or symbol lists in a document with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      doctoken - the token used for the document set operation
      symbol - if true, sets a single symbol; otherwise, sets a symbol list
      p1 - the symbol name or symbol list
      p2 - the symbol value or delimiter
      unescaped - if true, the symbols are unescaped
      listLength - the maximum length of the symbol list
      nohandle - if true, the command response is returned without handling
      respVar - the response variable to set the EIBRESP value
      resp2Var - the response variable to set the EIBRESP2 value
      Returns:
      the command response
      Throws:
      OnlineErrorException - if an error occurs during execution
      ExitProgramException - if the program needs to exit
